title: GY Bayonet Light Bulbs Neutral White 4000K B22 LED Bulbs,9.5W 1521 Lumen Ultra Bright Energy Saving 100W Equivalent,Non-dimmable,6-Pack
features: 【Save More on Your Electricity Bill】Unlike conventional A and A++ rated.GY A60 B22 bayonet bulbs are rated to the new UK energy efficiency class-C, which is far superior to conventional E, F and A++ rated conventional energy efficiency.

【Lower Wattage Higher Brightness】GY B22 bayonet bulbs use our latest technology to produce higher brightness with lower power consumption. Normal F-class LED B22 bulb 13W can only achieve 1500LM, while GY B22 9.5W bayonet bulb can reach 1521LM, which is more bright while saving energy.

【Eye Protection】GY B22 LED bulb is suitable for 220-240V AC input voltage, 1521lumens,instant illumination, no flicker, no glare, better eye protection (Note: do not look directly into the bulb when working).GY bayonet bulb produces low heat when working, the body of the bulb does not heat up like other bulbs.

【Colour Rendering Index >80】Which ensures vivid viewing pleasure with original colours compared to other products with a value below 80. Note: This lamp is not dimmable and is not compatible with dimmers.

【Wide Use and Long Life】Standard B22 baynoet socket, easy to install, suitable for a wide range of fixtures.GY Bayonet LED bulbs have an average life span of 25,000 hours, which effectively reduces the cost of bulb usage and overall cost.
description: Product Description Save more on electricity bills Super energy-efficient Low energy consumption, High brightness. Our light bulbs are super energy efficient and provide brighter lumens. New and old energy efficiency ratings upgraded The latest British energy efficiency rating of C is far superior to the traditional rating of A++、E. Previous page Next page Previous page Next page
